name: Brewed Awakening
series_premise: 📍  Setting: “Brewed Awakening”, a hole-in-the-wall indie café.
🤖  Staff: Crema-12, an espresso-ratio zealot; Max Blackwood, sarcasm-powered bartender.
👥  Regulars: Dev Hayes (anxious coder) & Gus Ledger (gruff old print-news loyalist).
• Crema-12 invents odd drinks (olive-oil flat white v7, etc.).
• Max solves chaos with eye-rolls and shots (java  whiskey).
• Dev half-codes his feelings, fears robot takeover.
• Gus grumbles about “back when coffee cost a quarter” but tips big.
🎭  Tone:  workplace-sitcom, witty, PG-13, <180 sec micro-scenes, no fourth-wall breaks.
